appliedUpdates.description: Documented that the shared live Mission-GUI-TEST validator-phase Mission session should be treated as read-only for destructive pause/kill and optional-permission checks, using isolated renderer-state injection or copied snapshots instead.

frictions.description: The shared live Mission-GUI-TEST validator-phase session was actively running, so triggering real Pause/Kill Worker flows or optional Mission permissions would have mutated shared mission state for other validators.
frictions.resolution: Used the live Electron surface for read-only running-state assertions, then validated destructive or optional runtime permutations with isolated in-memory renderer-state injection, copied Mission snapshots, and existing focused automated coverage.

frictions.description: Mission Control emitted duplicate-key React warnings for recovered handoff entries during live Mission view checks.
frictions.resolution: Left unchanged in this validator run because the warnings did not block the asserted Mission-control behaviors.

frictions.description: After full Electron reloads, the isolated UI briefly showed an empty/no-project state before the Mission session rehydrated from disk.
frictions.resolution: Waited for restore to settle before collecting persistence/timeline evidence from the copied Mission snapshot.
